name: Cherry Creek Valley International Farmers Market
notes: On-file website (https://www.localharvestfoods.com/) is dead - DNS does not resolve. On-file Facebook URL (facebook.com/pages/local-harvest-foods/321786756591) could not be verified as an active/legitimate page for this market; no usable content was retrievable. Web searches turned up no official site or official Facebook/Instagram for this specific market - only third-party aggregator listings (LocalHarvest.org, CropCart, Foraged, Westword, topfarmersmarkets.com) that repeat the same address (710 S. Ash St., Denver, CO 80246) with no consistent hours/season and no verifiable contact info. One aggregator listing cites market dates from 2010 (Saturdays May 29-Oct 9, 8:30am-1:30pm), suggesting this market may be defunct or long inactive. A search for what occupies 710 S. Ash St. today returned Colorado Shines/Dept. of Early Childhood, not an obvious market venue, casting further doubt on current operation. Given no legitimate official source could be confirmed, no fields were filled to avoid guessing.
